executives.name: Kathy Warden
executives.background: Ms. Warden is Chair, Chief Executive Officer and President of Northrop Grumman Corporation. She has been CEO and President since January 2019 and was elected Chair of the Board in August 2019. Prior to becoming CEO and President, she served as President and Chief Operating Officer from 2018 to 2019.

executives.name: Lal Karsanbhai
executives.background: Lal Karsanbhai is President and Chief Executive Officer of Emerson. He was named CEO in 2021 and joined the company's board of directors that same year. He previously served as Executive President of Emerson’s Automation Solutions business.

executives.name: Risa Lavizzo-Mourey
executives.background: Dr. Risa Lavizzo-Mourey has been a director since 2018. She is President Emerita of the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and a professor at the University of Pennsylvania.

executives.name: Robert Davis
executives.background: Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and President of Merck & Co., Inc.

executives.name: Thomas Glocer
executives.background: Former CEO of Thomson Reuters Corporation.

executives.name: Wendell Weeks
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Corning Incorporated.
